    Class Accessor

    A typed view into a buffer view that contains raw binary data.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class Accessor : LogicalChildOfRoot, IExtraProperties, IChildOf<GlbData>

    Properties

    Name Description
    ByteLength

    Gets the number of bytes, starting at ByteOffset use by this Accessor
    ByteOffset

    Gets the starting byte offset within SourceBufferView.
    Count

    Gets the number of items.
    Dimensions

    Gets the DimensionType of an item.
    Encoding

    Gets the EncodingType of an item.
    Format
    IsSparse

    Gets a value indicating whether this Accessor has a sparse structure.
    Normalized

    Gets a value indicating whether the items values are normalized.
    SourceBufferView

    Gets the BufferView buffer that contains the items as an encoded byte array.
